title: manihot triphylla var. genuina
intro: Manihot triphylla var. genuina, also known as the wild cassava or manihot triphylla, is a plant species belonging to the Euphorbiaceae family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. It has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. The plant can be prepared as a decoction, tea, or infusion, and its leaves and roots are often used in herbal medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
